summary: Strengthened the Foreman planner prompt and per-task planner instruction so recon is bounded and the final response must include the PLAN-JSON block.
filesChanged: extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md - added recon budget, minimal narration guidance, and repeated hard PLAN-JSON output contract
extensions/foreman/index.ts - reinforced the PLAN-JSON final-output contract inside plannerTaskFor only
howToVerify: grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -q -- "---PLAN-JSON---" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -q -- "---END-PLAN-JSON---" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -qiE "FINAL message MUST|recon budget|6.10 tool calls|imperfect PLAN-JSON|narration without the block" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -q -- "---PLAN-JSON---" extensions/foreman/index.ts && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
raw:
## Completed
Strengthened the Foreman planner prompt discipline so it bounds recon and must emit the `PLAN-JSON` block, even with incomplete recon. Reinforced the same contract in `plannerTaskFor()` only.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md` - added recon budget, minimal narration guidance, and hard final-output contract near top and before the JSON template.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - added one final planner task instruction line inside `plannerTaskFor()`.

## How To Verify
Ran successfully:

```bash
grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -q -- "---PLAN-JSON---" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -q -- "---END-PLAN-JSON---" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -qiE "FINAL message MUST|recon budget|6.10 tool calls|imperfect PLAN-JSON|narration without the block" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -q -- "---PLAN-JSON---" extensions/foreman/index.ts && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
```

## Notes
Real behavioral validation still requires a live planner run at the next Gate 1, since prompt-following can’t be fully unit-tested.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)

{
  "summary": "Strengthened the Foreman planner prompt and per-task planner instruction so recon is bounded and the final response must include the PLAN-JSON block.",
  "filesChanged": [
    "extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md - added recon budget, minimal narration guidance, and repeated hard PLAN-JSON output contract",
    "extensions/foreman/index.ts - reinforced the PLAN-JSON final-output contract inside plannerTaskFor only"
  ],
  "howToVerify": "grep -q \"claude-opus-4-8:xhigh\" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -q -- \"---PLAN-JSON---\" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -q -- \"---END-PLAN-JSON---\" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -qiE \"FINAL message MUST|recon budget|6.10 tool calls|imperfect PLAN-JSON|narration without the block\" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && grep -q -- \"---PLAN-JSON---\" extensions/foreman/index.ts && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh"
}
